title: Senior Plant Manager at Patanjali Ayurved

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Patanjali Ayurved
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
